I'm Doyun

Hi, I'm Doyun Kim

I'm a electrical engineering student at University of Washington. My fields of interest are Robotics, Controls, and Embedded Systems.

Projects Skills Contact Me
More About Me

Projects

Sonos Teardown

drumel microprobing Electronics Teardown PCB analysis audio system design

Conducted detailed teardown analysis of Sonos Era speaker, documenting internal components, driver configuration, and PCB design. Created technical documentation with photos and assembly insights for engineering reference.

LAIKA, the robot dog

Control Algorithm Robotics Power Management Human-Robot Interaction

Developing a quadrupedal robot controlled with voice commands; a perfect "pet" project

Sonos Teardown

drumel microprobing Electronics Teardown PCB analysis audio system design

Conducted detailed teardown analysis of Sonos Era speaker, documenting internal components, driver configuration, and PCB design. Created technical documentation with photos and assembly insights for engineering reference.
